title: echium microphyllum
intro: Echium microphyllum, also known as Viper's Bugloss, is a flowering plant that belongs to the borage family (Boraginaceae). This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. The health benefits of Echium microphyllum include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve heart health, and provide antioxidant properties. Echium microphyllum can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues and cardiovascular problems.
